inputs.normalization_note: FY25 total dividend 22c/sh; base uses 24c run-rate (75% NPAT target on ~32c underlying EPS). 1H25 interim cut to 9c reflects iron ore price trough, not normalized MAC volume.

optionality_gate.notes: FY25 dividend yield ~5.0% at AUD 4.43; Lawrence 5yr curve base 8.0%; Thacker Pass and development royalties in overlay bull only.

bear.notes: Iron ore price stays weak; dividends 18c/yr; no Thacker milestone; terminal flat

base.notes: 24c/yr dividends + partial Thacker buyback milestone + MAC volume offset

lines.label: Cumulative dividends years 1-5 (~24c/yr)
lines.math: 5 x AUD 0.24 from FY25 75% payout policy

lines.label: Thacker Pass buyback milestone (probability-weighted)
lines.math: US$13.2m buyback entitlement; first production late 2027 [Assumption]

lines.label: Terminal re-rate on normalized royalty yield
lines.math: MAC hub ramp + gold offtake margin persistence [Assumption]

sotp_build.notes: GAAP net assets 19.1c/sh (Dec-24); intangible royalties drive economic value

bull.notes: Thacker Pass production from late 2027; MAC 145mtpa hub ramp; gold offtakes sustained; dividend re-rating

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Net tangible assets (42.1)c/sh Dec-24; net assets 19.1c/sh; royalty intangibles carry economic value

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Thacker Pass GRR 1.05% post buyback; first production late 2027 (FY25 presentation)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Development-stage royalties in portfolio; Trident acquisition expanded gold offtake book

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Gold offtake net revenue margin AUD 21.5M FY25 in consolidated revenue

nav_overlay.note: Company states net assets preferred over NTA because NTA excludes royalty intangibles

nav_overlay_options.label: Thacker Pass lithium royalty
nav_overlay_options.base_terminal_rationale: US$13.2m buyback + 1.05% GRR from late 2027; probability-weighted not in Lawrence FCF0

nav_overlay_options.label: Development and exploration royalty book
nav_overlay_options.base_terminal_rationale: No filing-level NAV for pre-production assets; zero in base overlay after scan
nav_overlay_options.evidence: Corporate presentation portfolio slide; no audited fair values

catalyst_paths.impact: 24c/yr dividends + partial Thacker buyback milestone + MAC volume offset
Iron ore price stays weak; dividends 18c/yr; no Thacker milestone; terminal flat

paths.label: Lawrence yield-curve / stance gate
paths.weight_why: Lawrence yield-curve or optionality_gate primary return; stance bar for accumulate.
weight_falsifiers: Gate return not updated when scenarios.base payoff/years change
Dated NAV path double-counts dividends already in yield gate

paths.label: Economic payoff dated (5yr)
paths.weight_why: Answers a different question (NAV convergence) than 7yr cash-flow IRR; capped weight to avoid theory conflation.
weight_falsifiers: NAV overlay base not updated when segment build or filings change >10%
floor_pass false but weight above 15% without [HUMAN REVIEW]

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Third-party confirms asset quality not in GAAP book; not full floor at spot price

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base

flags: NAV overlay is a different theory (asset payoff vs cash-flow IRR); weight capped at 10% to limit theory conflation.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
